payload:
GH_RANGE=1-13
BRANCH=main

1. read ./README.md
2. look at gh commits to see which gh issues in <GH_RANGE> have already been completed
3. find the NEXT_GH_ISSUE sequentially
4. read <NEXT_GH_ISSUE> detail
5. impl fix, commit message in a way that will close gh issue when pushed to main
6. push to <BRANCH>

iteration is finished when you've pushed to <BRANCH>
loop is finished when all the issues in <GH_RANGE> are finished


IMPORTANT:

- One gh issue per iteration
- Do not commit any ralph files
-... [truncated, 572 chars total]
issue #2 fixed: replaced panics with anyhow error propagation, pushed to main. Next: issue #3 (URL encoding)
issue #3 fixed: URL-encode search query using percent-encoding crate, pushed to main. Next: issue #4 (inaccurate lat/lng offsets)
issue #4 fixed: replaced hardcoded miles_to_degrees with HaversineDestination for accurate lat/lng offsets at all latitudes, pushed to main. Next: issue #5 (duplicate places in output)
issue #5 fixed: deduplicate places by id (fallback to name+address+city) in ddg.rs, pushed to main. Next: issue #6 (unknown --file-type silently produces no output)

issue #6 fixed: added possible_values(['csv','json']) to FILE-TYPE clap arg in main.rs, invalid values now rejected before any network requests. Pushed to main. Next: issue #7 (no HTTP timeout, hangs indefinitely)

issue #7 fixed: added 15s HTTP timeout to reqwest Client in ddg.rs using Client::builder().timeout(). Issue #8 was already fixed by the haversine rewrite, closed on GitHub. Next: issue #9 (hardcoded 5-mile grid cell size)
issue #9 fixed: grid cell size now scales dynamically as (distance_miles / 2.0).clamp(1.0, 20.0) in ddg.rs. Next: issue #10 (JSON output builds entire result in memory as String)
issue #10 fixed: output_as_json now uses serde_json::to_writer(io::stdout(), &data) instead of building string in memory. Next: issue #11 (clap v2 EOL, upgrade to v4 with derive API)

issue #11 fixed: clap migrated from v2.33.3 to v4 with derive API. #[derive(Parser)] struct replaces manual App/Arg builder; typed fields eliminate manual parse calls. Next: issue #12 (geocoding wildcard version)
issue #12 fixed: geocoding wildcard version pinned to 0.4. Next: issue #13 (remove unused std::str import from ddg.rs)
